name: Chewy Granola Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugars until well combined.
2. Add honey, vanilla, and egg; mix well.
3. Combine dry ingredients: flour, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt; stir into the creamed mixture.
4. Stir in oats, cereal, nuts, raisins (optional), and chocolate chips (optional).
5. Press mixture into a greased 9 x 13 pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
